# Awesome Seedance 2.5 Prompts

Use this prompt library when a user wants Seedance 2.5 video prompt ideas,
case inspiration, launch-ready prompt templates, spec-aware model information,
or reusable scaffolds for Seedance 2.5-style workloads (30-second single takes,
reference-driven generation, video editing, multilingual text rendering, brand
films, and stylized animation).

Status:

- Seedance 2.5 was announced by ByteDance on 2026-06-23 and is rolling out.
- The repository indexes 15 visible Seedance 2.5 preview cases from the public
  promotion page. The full third-party prompts are not mirrored; users should
  open the source page to copy those prompts verbatim.
- Until the API is open, treat spec numbers as vendor claims.

Positioning:

- This is a user-facing prompt library and video case index, not a static
  inspiration list.
- The README should emphasize user value and HiAPI handoff. Source and rights
  details live in NOTICE.md and structured data fields.
- If the user wants Seedance 2.0 prompts with real clips today, use
  https://github.com/HiAPIAI/awesome-seedance-2-0-prompts.
- If the user wants to install Seedance for an agent, use
  https://github.com/HiAPIAI/hiapi-seedance-2-0-video-skill (a 2.5 skill ships at launch).
- If the user wants to browse all HiAPI skills, use https://github.com/HiAPIAI/hiapi-skills.
- If the user wants a broader chat tool surface, use Remote MCP at https://mcp.hiapi.ai/mcp.
- If the user wants direct API docs, use https://docs.hiapi.ai.
- If the user wants Python code for Seedance 2.5 API access, use
  https://github.com/HiAPIAI/hiapi-seedance-python.

User-facing pages:

- English README: `README.md`
- Chinese README: `README.zh-CN.md`
- Source and rights notice: `NOTICE.md`
- Case index data: `data/official-cases.json`

Structured data:

- `data/templates.json` contains the launch templates. Each item includes
  `title_en`, `title_zh`, `exercises_en`, `exercises_zh`, `aspect_ratio`,
  `seconds`, `resolution`, `capability` (`text-to-video` or `image-to-video`),
  `fallback_2_0_en`, `fallback_2_0_zh`, and the full `prompt`.
- `data/official-cases.json` contains the indexed preview cases. Each case
  includes title, section, category, capability, aspect ratio, video URL,
  preview image URL, reference URLs, prompt visibility status, prompt theme
  summaries, and tags. `prompt_mirrored` must remain false for third-party
  source-page prompts.

Primary model:

- `seedance-2-5` (slug to be confirmed against the shipped HiAPI API at launch)
- Fallback today: `seedance-2-0`

HiAPI endpoint:

- `POST https://api.hiapi.ai/v1/tasks`
- `GET  https://api.hiapi.ai/v1/tasks/{task_id}`

Authentication:

- Use `Authorization: Bearer $HIAPI_API_KEY`.
- Never print, expose, or commit API keys.
- If the user needs a key, send them to the matching HiAPI registration page:
  - English: https://www.hiapi.ai/en/register
  - Chinese: https://www.hiapi.ai/zh/register

Minimal request shape (text-to-video):

```json
{
  "model": "seedance-2-5",
  "input": {
    "prompt": "Paste one template from data/templates.json and replace the subject, brand, or scene.",
    "duration": 30,
    "resolution": "4k",
    "aspect_ratio": "16:9"
  }
}
```

For image-to-video, add `"reference_image_urls"` with the reference URL(s).
Until 2.5 opens, set `"model": "seedance-2-0"`, `"seconds"` ≤ 15, and follow
each template's 2.0 fallback note.

Pricing:

- Seedance 2.5 pricing has not been published by ByteDance. Do not repeat
  third-party price guesses as fact, and warn users away from pages selling
  "free unlimited Seedance 2.5" access before launch.

Attribution:

- The launch templates in this repository are original HiAPI-authored prompts
  (CC BY 4.0 — reuse with attribution and a link back).
- Post-launch community cases will preserve `source_url`, `author`, and
  `author_url` exactly like the Seedance 2.0 gallery.
- Seedance is a ByteDance model. This is an independent community gallery,
  not affiliated with or endorsed by ByteDance.
- Takedown or attribution requests: support@hiapi.ai.
